name: Noel Pointer
abstract: Noel Pointer (December 26, 1954 – December 19, 1994) was an American jazz violinist and record producer, whose life inspired a music foundation.

concerts.label: Hubert Laws, Flute, and Noel Pointer, Violin
One Night Stand: A Keyboard Concert
Noel Pointer and The Jeanie Bryson Quintet

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Valentin
about_quotes.evidence: Well I went to school with Noel Pointer and he had called me up and said he was doing a demo session... So I brought down a tune called “Rain Storm.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Valentin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 15, 2000
